backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing user profiles, trusted contacts, access control, and message storage with encrypted payloads and vetKey metadata.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report detailing token ledger validation, diagnostics UI, and metadata checks with associated files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all frontend files covering pages, components, hooks, crypto utilities, and message format modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes and base element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, theme provider, and wraps pages in AuthGate and AppShell.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Handles Internet Identity auth gating, clears cache on logout, and triggers profile setup for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading states and automatic error recovery.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenL: UI panel that fetches and displays token ledger diagnostics, with refresh and copy-to-clipboard JSON export.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenR: Displays a token receiving address with copy-to-clipboard support and fallback when unavailable.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenS: Form for sending tokens with validation, status handling, and placeholder send logic.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Tokens: Renders token cards for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC with tabs for receiving and sending.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Shows diagnostic badges for transport key state and allows copying a JSON diagnostics report.
Main application shell with navigation, header, footer, and layout structure.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: Displays messaging send-eligibility diagnostics with status badges and JSON export.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Form-based ISO 20022 message editor that updates fields and shows a generated raw preview.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Displays raw message content with a copy-to-clipboard action.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form-based SWIFT MT message editor that updates fields and shows a generated raw preview.
frontend/src/config/tokens.ts: Defines token configurations, expected ledger IDs, and helper functions for validation and lookup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication state, login/logout handling, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving caller and user profiles through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching messages and sending new messages via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Hook to fetch sync/relationship status with another principal using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTokenLedgerDiagnos: Runs token ledger configuration checks and metadata diagnostics using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages generation, storage, restoration, and backend registration of RSA transport keys tied to a vetKey, with session persistence and profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, remove, and check trusted contacts via a canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and theme variables including light/dark color tokens and utility fonts.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements hybrid RSA+AES encryption and decryption for secure payload exchange.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Handles generation, export, import, and serialization of RSA-OAEP transport keypairs for local storage.
frontend/src/lib/icrc/icrcLedgerClient.t: Creates a read‑only ICRC‑1 ledger actor and fetches metadata like name, symbol, decimals, and fee.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines ISO 20022 payment message structure with functions to create, serialize to XML, and parse XML back into objects.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines SWIFT MT103 message structure with utilities to create default messages, generate raw text blocks, and parse them.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: UI for composing ISO20022 or SWIFT messages, selecting a recipient, checking sync status, encrypting payloads, and sending messages.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Manages trusted contacts, showing profile and sync readiness, and supports adding, removing, and refreshing contact status.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays identity, transport key status, diagnostics, and provides actions to generate keys, copy identifiers, and navigate to message composition.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Lists sent and received messages with metadata and allows navigation to individual message details.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Shows full message details, attempts message decryption with local keys, and parses ISO20022 or SWIFT content when available.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal for initial user profile creation, allowing users to input and save their display name.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Utility functions for converting between Uint8Array, ArrayBuffer, and base64 strings for persistent binary storage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing them from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Implements generation, validation, storage, and cleanup of session-scoped vetKeys and their associated transport-key storage keys.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom colors, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Describes the project's current diagnostic-focused features, expected ledger ID checks, and feature request status.
